threats.title: Weak Authentication Bypass
threats.description: Due to the lack of information regarding authentication mechanisms, the system may be vulnerable to attackers impersonating legitimate users. Without strong authentication (e.g., multi-factor authentication, robust password policies), attackers could gain unauthorized access.
threats.attack_vector: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the authentication logic, brute-force attacks against weak passwords, or credential stuffing attacks using leaked credentials from other systems.
mitigations: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.
Enforce strong password policies (length, complexity, rotation).
Regularly audit authentication logs for suspicious activity and implement intrusion detection systems.

threats.title: Data Injection via Unvalidated Input
threats.description: The system lacks details on input validation practices.  If user-supplied data is not properly sanitized or validated before being used in database queries or other operations, attackers could inject malicious code (e.g., SQL injection) or manipulate data to alter system behavior or exfiltrate sensitive information.
threats.affected_component: All components processing user input (web application, APIs)
threats.attack_vector: Malicious input crafted by an attacker, bypassing input validation controls.
mitigations: Implement strict input validation and sanitization for all user-supplied data.
Use parameterized queries or prepared statements to prevent SQL injection.
Employ a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to filter malicious requests.

threats.title: IDOR Vulnerability
threats.description: The lack of information on the system’s authorization mechanisms creates a potential for IDOR (Insecure Direct Object Reference) vulnerabilities. Attackers could manipulate request parameters to access resources or perform actions that they should not be authorized to perform, potentially gaining elevated privileges.
threats.attack_vector: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the application's authorization logic, manipulating request parameters to access unauthorized resources.
mitigations: Implement robust authorization controls based on the principle of least privilege.
Avoid using direct object references (e.g., database IDs) in URLs or request parameters.
Use indirect object references or access control lists (ACLs) to control access to resources.

threats.title: Data Leakage due to Insufficient Access Controls
threats.description: Without knowing the data classification scheme or access control policies, there's a risk that users could inadvertently or maliciously access sensitive data.  This could occur due to overly permissive access rights, lack of data masking, or vulnerabilities in the application's data handling logic.
threats.attack_vector: Unauthorized access to sensitive data through misconfigured access controls, vulnerabilities in the application code, or social engineering attacks.
mitigations: Implement a robust data classification scheme and enforce appropriate access controls based on the sensitivity of the data.
Utilize data masking and encryption techniques to protect sensitive data at rest and in transit.
Regularly review and update access control policies.

threats.title: Lack of Audit Logging
threats.description: The system’s lack of defined security practices means there is no information on whether audit logging is implemented. Without comprehensive audit logging, it will be impossible to trace actions performed within the system, making it difficult to investigate security incidents, determine accountability, or demonstrate compliance with regulations.
threats.attack_vector: An attacker can perform actions without any record of them, making it impossible to identify the source of a security breach or hold someone accountable.
mitigations: Implement comprehensive audit logging for all critical system events (user logins, data modifications, system changes).
Regularly review audit logs for suspicious activity.
Establish procedures for log retention and archiving.

gaps: Insufficient coverage of AC-4 and AC-6 across multiple threats.
Limited implementation of SI controls, particularly around data leakage and access control.
Lack of a comprehensive audit logging strategy beyond basic event recording.
priorities: High: Weak Authentication Bypass (AC-17, AC-3, AU-2, AU-3, AU-6, IA-2, IA-5, IA-8, SC-8) - Critical severity, impacts all threats.
Medium: Data Leakage due to Insufficient Access Controls (AC-2, AC-3, AC-4, AC-6, MP-5, SC-13, SC-28, SC-8) - High severity, significant compliance risk.

content.dfd_mermaid:
flowchart TB

    %% Styling
    classDef external fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#0277bd,stroke-width:2px
    classDef process fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#2e7d32,stroke-width:2px
    classDef datastore fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ef6c00,stroke-width:2px
    classDef threat fill:#ffebee,stroke:#c62828,stroke-width:3px

    subgraph External["External Entities"]
        user[("👤 User")]
        admin[("👔 Admin")]
        external_api[("🌐 External API")]
    end

    subgraph TrustBoundary["Trust Boundary"]
        subgraph Frontend["Frontend Layer"]
            web_app["🖥️ Web Application"]
        end

        subgraph Backend["Backend Layer"]
            api_gateway["🚪 API Gateway"]
            auth_service["🔐 Auth Service"]
            core_api["⚙️ Core API"]
        end

        subgraph Data["Data Layer"]
            database[("💾 Database")]
            cache[("⚡ Cache")]
        end
    end

    %% Data Flows
    user -->|"🔒 HTTPS"| web_app
    admin -->|"🔒 HTTPS + MFA"| web_app
    web_app -->|"🔒 API Calls"| api_gateway
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Auth Check"| auth_service
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Business Logic"| core_api
    auth_service -->|"🔒 User Data"| database
    core_api -->|"🔒 CRUD"| database
    core_api -->|"⚠️ Session"| cache
    core_api -->|"🔒 External Call"| external_api

    %% Apply Styles
    class user,admin,external_api external
    class web_app,api_gateway,auth_service,core_api process
    class database,cache datastore
    class web_app,api_gateway,auth_service,core_api,database threat

custom_policies.name: check_spoofing_1

custom_policies.name: check_tampering_2
custom_policies.guideline: Implement strict input validation and sanitization for all user-supplied data.

custom_policies.guideline: Implement robust authorization controls based on the principle of least privilege.

custom_policies.guideline: Implement a robust data classification scheme and enforce appropriate access controls based on the sensitivity of the data.

custom_policies.guideline: Implement comprehensive audit logging for all critical system events (user logins, data modifications, system changes).

semgrep.config_file:
rules:
- id: security-custom-1
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Weak Authentication Bypass
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-287
    owasp: A07:2021
    threat_category: Spoofing
  patterns:
  - pattern: password = "..."
  - pattern: secret = "..."
  - pattern: api_key = "..."
  severity: ERROR
- fix: cursor.execute($QUERY, (params,))
  id: security-custom-2
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Data Injection via Unvalidated Input
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-89
    owasp: A03:2021
    threat_category: Tampering
  patterns:
  - pattern: cursor.execute($QUERY)
    pattern-not: cursor.execute($QUERY, $PARAMS)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-3
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: IDOR Vulnerability
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-269
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Elevation of Privilege
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-4
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Data Leakage due to Insufficient Access Controls
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-200
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Information Disclosure
  patterns:
  - pattern: print($SENSITIVE)
  - pattern: console.log($SENSITIVE)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-5
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Lack of Audit Logging
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-778
    owasp: A09:2021
    threat_category: Repudiation
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
